falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's implied bottoming behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 50% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would indicate a blowoff top or extreme conviction, directly contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict's expectation of a bottoming pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Put-call ratio drops below 0.8 for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This extreme bullish sentiment would falsify the 'HOLD' signal by showing market participants are not preparing for a bottom but instead expecting a strong upward move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
